src/main/java/tr/org/lider/Lider2Applica.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/Lider2Applica.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in JDK 11+ with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE 9+).

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist'.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Replace deprecated @RequestMapping with specific @PostMapping and @PutMapping annotations.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: Spring Framework 6.x deprecates/removes generic @RequestMapping in favor of specific HTTP method annotations.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Update Swagger annotations from v2 (io.swagger.annotations) to v3 (io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations).
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.x+ requires io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations; old v2 annotations cause compile errors or missing API docs.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Replace legacy Spring MVC @RequestMapping annotations with Spring Boot 3 compatible @PostMapping annotations.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE) requires explicit HTTP method annotations or updated mapping styles; @RequestMapping without method attribute defaults to all methods, but the migration enforces RESTful best practices and compatibility with newer Spring Web MVC configurations.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Migrate Spring MVC annotations to Spring Boot 3 / Spring Framework 6 equivalents.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Spring Framework 6, where @RequestMapping is deprecated in favor of specific method annotations like @PostMapping, and @ResponseBody is redundant when returning ResponseEntity.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Migrate Spring MVC annotations to Spring Boot 3 / Spring Framework 6 equivalents.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Spring Framework 6, where @RequestMapping is deprecated in favor of specific method annotations like @PostMapping, and @ResponseBody is redundant when returning ResponseEntity.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Migrate Spring MVC annotations to Spring Boot 3 / Spring Framework 6 equivalents.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Spring Framework 6, where @RequestMapping is deprecated in favor of specific method annotations like @PutMapping, and @ResponseBody is redundant when returning ResponseEntity.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Migrate Spring MVC annotations to Spring Boot 3 / Spring Framework 6 equivalents.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Spring Framework 6, where @RequestMapping is deprecated in favor of specific method annotations like @PostMapping, and @ResponseBody is redundant when returning ResponseEntity.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest import with jakarta.servlet equivalents or remove if unused, as part of the Jakarta EE namespace migration required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+; code using javax.servlet will fail to compile.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Replace javax.validation.Valid import with jakarta.validation.Valid, as part of the Jakarta EE namespace migration required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: javax.validation classes are removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+; code using javax.validation will fail to compile.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Replace javax.cache imports with jakarta.cache equivalents, as part of the Jakarta EE namespace migration required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.why_exists: javax.cache classes are removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+; code using javax.cache will fail to compile.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.general_idea: Replace deprecated RequestMethod enum with specific Spring MVC annotation stereotypes.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.why_exists: RequestMethod is deprecated in Spring Framework 6 (used by Spring Boot 3) and removed in later versions; using @GetMapping/@PostMapping is required for compilation.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.general_idea: Replace deprecated RequestMethod enum with specific Spring MVC annotation stereotypes.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.why_exists: RequestMethod is deprecated in Spring Framework 6 (used by Spring Boot 3) and removed in later versions; using @GetMapping/@PostMapping is required for compilation.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.general_idea: Update import statements to use new package locations for Spring Web annotations.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.why_exists: The old import paths (e.g., org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMethod) do not exist in Spring Framework 6/Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.general_idea: Update import statements to use new package locations for Spring Web annotations.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.why_exists: The old import paths (e.g., org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam) are replaced by PathVariable in this context, and specific annotation imports are required.

src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.general_idea: Migrate from Swagger 2 (io.swagger.annotations) to OpenAPI 3 (io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations) for API documentation.
src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/C.why_exists: Springdoc OpenAPI 2.x (compatible with Spring Boot 3) uses the io.swagger.v3.oas package; the old io.swagger.annotations package is incompatible and causes compilation errors if referenced.
